name: gitview-bridge
description: GitView bridge — serves a git repo (read + working-tree write) and drives/attaches Claude sessions for the GitView Android app.
//: The two @anthropic-ai/* packages are OPTIONAL so the bridge builds/boots without a Claude subscription or SDK install; the Claude layer loads them via dynamic import and degrades gracefully if absent. Pin & re-verify their option names against current docs before relying on them — see docs/DECISIONS.md ADR-010/011 and the mid-2026 research notes.
